title: !       Mace3D
description: ITS 3D MACE BY @pubixd some tweeks by @hardikgoyalog
body:
**3D MACE!! Texture Pack!**

## **Features**
## 
Game Version :  1.21

Pack Version :  1.0 

Features : 

      - Custom Animations
      
      - Custom Weapon Textures

## **Installation**
For PC Users -

Download the File from the Versions Tab

Open your resourcepacks folder in your .minecraft folder

Copy and paste the .zip / .rar file into the resourcepacks folder

MACE 3D!  has been installed!

If you face any more issues, kindly watch this video


## Credits
**@hardikgoyalog :  For creating the Modrinth page**

**@pubixd : For Creating the 3d mace texture pack and being an awesome youtuber!**
